title: Hurricane
description: Complete 72 hours before a hurricane makes landfall in your area.

items.text: Know your evacuation zone — look up zone letter on local EM website
Fill all vehicle gas tanks now — stations sell out 36–48 hours out
Withdraw $300+ cash — ATMs and card readers fail without power
Store 1 gallon of water per person per day for minimum 14 days
Fill bathtubs using WaterBob or standard fill (backup water source)
Stock 2 weeks of non-perishable food that requires no cooking
Purchase or install hurricane shutters or pre-cut plywood for all windows
Charge all devices, battery banks, and backup batteries
Program NOAA weather radio with your county SAME code
Secure or bring inside all outdoor furniture, grills, and loose items
Identify your interior safe room (lowest floor, most interior room)
Gather medications — minimum 30-day supply before storm season
Generator placed outside, minimum 20 feet from any window or door
Stock generator fuel — use fuel stabilizer for storage
Document all valuables with photos for insurance
Know the location of gas, water, and electric shutoffs in your home
First aid kit checked and restocked
Emergency contacts written on paper (do not rely on phone)
Pet food, crate, and medications packed if evacuating
Important documents in waterproof bag: ID, insurance, medical records
